calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Geraldine Ann Freeman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bal Global Finance, LLC. Order waiving live testimony was filed.
Robert R. Gross, esq. for Co-Defaulted Defendant, Charles A. Cunningham, appeared. The court adviced counsel that matter was defaulted and no motion to set aside default was filed.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Prepress Assembly, Inc. and Charles A. Cunningham.
Matter was submitted, proposed judgment received in court, and taken under submission.

PM
Judgment signed and granted by Commissioner Sue Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES: Geraldine Freemen for Plaintiff/Moving Party. No other appearances.

Application For Writ Of Possession After Hrg; Ntc
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Application For Writ of Attachment is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
